name: channels_last_antipatterns
description: channels_last memory format HURTS performance on: (1) depthwise convs with asymmetric kernels (3x7) -- 0.22x regression, (2) pointwise 1x1 convs on large spatial dims (1024x1024) -- 0.32x regression. Only use channels_last for standard/grouped convs, NOT depthwise or pointwise.
when_to_apply: Check before applying channels_last to any conv -- verify it's not depthwise with asymmetric kernel or pointwise on large spatial.
